title: Goety Cataclysm
description: Compatibility mod between Goety and L_Ender 's Cataclysm
body:
Goety & Cataclysm is a compatibility mod between Goety and L_Ender's Cataclysm, that allows you to gain access to cataclysmic spells and abilities of powerful monsters of the latter mod!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09cd58a56c92d7b09093ec6802aba037d2c3f9f5.png)

## Discord:
